item.title: Integration auto-detection during setup
steps: Implement email provider -> calendar/task discovery (e.g., iCloud email -> iCloud calendar)
Implement Ollama model discovery: list available models, assess capabilities
Implement optimal routing suggestion based on available models and template requirements
Pre-fill integration config from detected services
Show discovery results to user for confirmation during init flow
acceptanceCriteria: Email provider connection triggers related service discovery
Ollama models are discovered and capabilities assessed
Routing suggestions match template requirements to available models
User confirms all auto-detected integrations before config generation
